events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the legendary Sir Mick Jagger. Which Stones track is your ultimate anthem?

events.title: MTV's 45th Anniversary
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or did it just make us even bigger?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' 32nd Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, kicking off the Britpop era.

angles.name: Britpop Icon
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed everything. What's your top track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Remembering the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: 49 years ago today, we lost the King. Elvis Presley's legacy continues to shake, rattle, and roll. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, widely considered one of the greatest guitarists of all time, who passed away on this day in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: 56 years since we lost a true visionary. Jimi Hendrix's influence on music is immeasurable. What's your favourite Hendrix moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That cover, those tracks... pure genius. What's your go-to song from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll icon with a voice that commands attention. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and a British rock legend, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to Liam Gallagher! Whether it's Oasis or solo, his swagger and voice are legendary. What's your favourite Liam moment or track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' 55th Anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates globally. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple iPod's 25th Anniversary
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple put '1000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever. Did you have one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Celebrating James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Favourites
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, what's your favourite Bond film or moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incomparable John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Silly Walks & Genius
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy. What's your favourite Cleese moment?
